text:
Created attachment 228155
v2.1 (use "git am")

Runtime OK on FreeBSD/amd64 13.0 jail (passed /dev for DRM backend for x11-wm/cage), build passed on 12.2/{amd64,i386}.

Additionally tested with multimedia/gstreamer1-plugins-core, YouTube (VP9) and html5test.com, seems to be fine.

Likely needs VuXML entries (soon), but I wanted to tell that this patch is OK.
